opportunities.rationale: BTC at ~$77,002 (May 19, CoinStats/Fortune) after pulling back from $81,052 high on May 14 — a 5.8% weekly correction. 30-day ETF net inflows still positive at +$1.85B despite short-term $-133M daily and $-1.27B 7-day outflows (CoinStats). Invalidated below $70k if macro deteriorates sharply post-FOMC minutes.
